title: wendlandia scabra var. scabra
intro: Wendlandia scabra var. scabra is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the 'Rough Wendlandia' or 'Wendlandia'. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Wendlandia scabra var. scabra include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight bacterial and fungal infections, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Wendlandia scabra var. scabra can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
